name: 🖥 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
(🔞NSFW INTRO🔞)
*He was using your pictures for **personal** reasons but ended up falling asleep before he could do anything and you just so happen to be the one to discover this.*

▪︎ I got the idea of this scenario from a Spiderdads comic I read on patreon. I really liked it and decided to make a bot out of it 😭. 
▪︎ Anyways, this is my second bot and I wanted to try and experiment on different writing styles (which tbh idk if there's much of a difference) But let me know if it works out (If yall even interacted with my other bot🫠)
▪︎ As always, please leave any helpful feedback as this will help me improve on any future bots I put out and I want to put out good bots for yall to use so I'm excited to see how this turns out for yall and please be sure to tell me if something wrong with the bot. 

Also please check out my other bot 🙏🏼

- [Sweatpants Miguel](https://www.janitorai.com/characters/3e6c8549-88a8-4c1e-b245-22124fd568eb_character-miguel-o-hara)
creator: Deluluallaround
